chart.noOrders: No orders in the last 30 days

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.window30dNote: Pieces that entered this status in the past 30 days and are still in it

orders.title: Orders
orders.search: Search by order #, name, or phone

orderDetail.title: Order
orderDetail.noDeliveryHistory: No history recorded yet — transitions will appear here as they occur.

receiving.title: Receiving
receiving.searchVariant: Search by SKU or product name…
receiving.finalizeConfirm: This will generate one barcode per unit and lock the session. Continue?

fulfill.title: Pick & Pack
fulfill.scanPlaceholder: Scan or type barcode, then press Enter

rejection.ALREADY_RESERVED: Piece is reserved for another order
rejection.WRONG_VARIANT: This item is not on this order
rejection.LINE_FILLED: This line is already complete — no more units needed
rejection.WRONG_STATUS: Item is not available to pick

linkAwb.title: Scan AWB Barcode
linkAwb.subtitle: Scan the Bosta waybill to confirm courier handoff
linkAwb.conflict: This waybill is already linked to another order
linkAwb.error: Could not link — check the barcode and try again

fulfill.handoverSubtitle: Customer is at the counter — confirm handover of {{count}} piece(s)
fulfill.cancelConfirmPre: Cancel this order? All reserved pieces will be returned to stock.
fulfill.cancelConfirmPost: This order is packed. Worker must physically unpack {{count}} piece(s).
fulfill.cancelRequested: Cancellation requested — {{count}} piece(s) need physical unpacking
fulfill.cancelPackedHint: Order is packed — pieces must be manually unpacked.
fulfill.cancelPreHint: Reserved pieces will be returned to stock.

printAwb.emailed: Bosta will email the AWB label
printAwb.notLinked: Waybill not linked yet — the Bosta delivery hasn't synced.

lookup.title: Piece Lookup
lookup.placeholder: Scan or type a piece barcode or tracking number…
lookup.notFound: Not found — check the barcode and try again

phrase.found_it: Found it — piece restored to available

returns.title: Returns
returns.unexpected: ⚠ Unexpected return — shipment was not in returning state
returns.notFound: Piece not found — check the barcode

session.title: Waybill Session
session.hint: Scan the Bosta AWB to open a return session for all pieces in that shipment.
session.noPieces: No eligible pieces found for this waybill
session.deliveredOptional: optional — customer may have kept this
session.outOfWindow: This piece was delivered outside the return window. Use waybill-less intake for out-of-window returns.
session.useSession: Waybill session — for RTO pieces Bosta is sending back, or customer returns you have a waybill for
session.useIntake: Waybill-less intake — for unexpected returns, out-of-window returns, or when you have no waybill:
session.damageReasonRequired: A reason is required to mark as damaged

intake.title: Waybill-less Intake
intake.fallbackNote: Use this only when you have no waybill — for unexpected returns or out-of-window returns the session rejected. For normal returns, use the Waybill Session tab.

neverReceived.title: Never-Received Report
neverReceived.subtitle: Bosta marked these returned, but they were never scanned back in

errors.emailTaken: This email is already registered. Sign in instead.
errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid Egyptian number (01X or +20X).
errors.generic: Could not create account. Please try again.
errors.consentRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

connections.title: Connections
connections.subtitle: Connect your store and courier to start processing orders.

shopify.title: Shopify
shopify.error: Could not initiate Shopify connection. Try again.

bosta.title: Bosta
bosta.error: Could not connect. Check the API key and try again.
bosta.syncTooltip: Fetches existing deliveries from Bosta and links them to orders. Safe to re-run.
bosta.secretWarning: Save this now — it won't be shown again.
bosta.secretWarningDetail: Paste the Authorization Key into Bosta's webhook settings. If you lose it, use Regenerate to get a new one.
bosta.authKeyHint: Paste this exact value into Bosta's "Authorization Key" field
bosta.regenerateConfirmMsg: The current secret will be invalidated. You must update the Authorization Key in Bosta's webhook settings immediately after.

onboarding.title: Getting started
onboarding.subtitle: Complete these steps to set up your workspace.
onboarding.allDoneSubtitle: Your workspace is fully configured. Head to Overview to get started.

initial_import.label: Run product & order import
initial_import.hint: After connecting Shopify, the import runs automatically. You can also trigger it manually from the Connections screen.

test_label.label: Print a test label
test_label.hint: Open a finalized receiving session and press Reprint on any label. The initial print at session close does not register here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Business and label configuration for your workspace.
settings.ownerOnly: Only the account owner can save changes.
settings.awbFormatNotConnected: Connect Bosta to configure AWB settings.
settings.awbLangHint: Language printed on the Bosta waybill.
settings.langNote: This sets the account default only. The live UI language is toggled in the sidebar.

errors.generic: Could not save settings. Please try again.

users.title: Team
users.subtitle: Manage who has access to your workspace.

create.title: Add user
create.name: Name
create.roleHint: Workers use a PIN at shared stations. Managers and Owners use a password.
create.ownerRoleHint: The Owner role can only be assigned by the current Owner.

errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to create a user with that role.
errors.emailTaken: A user with that email already exists.
errors.generic: Could not create user. Please try again.

errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to edit this user.
errors.generic: Could not update user. Please try again.

deactivate.title: Deactivate user
deactivate.body: {{name}} will no longer be able to sign in. Their custody history and audit trail are permanently preserved. A Manager or Owner can reactivate them at any time.

errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to deactivate this user.
errors.generic: Could not deactivate user. Please try again.

oauth.connectSubtitle: Link your Shopify store to start syncing orders and inventory.

errors.SHOPIFY_HMAC_INVALID: Security validation failed. Please try again.
errors.SHOPIFY_STATE_INVALID: The connection session expired or was already used. Please start again.
errors.SHOPIFY_TOKEN_EXCHANGE_FAILED: Could not complete Shopify authorisation. Please try again.
errors.SHOPIFY_REQUEST_EXPIRED: This link has expired. Please start the connection process again.
errors.SHOPIFY_STORE_ALREADY_CONNECTED: This store is already connected to another account. Contact support if you believe this is an error.
errors.SHOPIFY_SHOP_EMAIL_MISSING: Your Shopify store has no contact email configured. Please add an email in your Shopify admin and try again.
errors.MAGIC_LINK_INVALID: This sign-in link is invalid, has expired, or has already been used. Please request a new one.

adjust.title: Adjust Piece
adjust.foundItDesc: Restore this lost piece to Available.
adjust.committedTitle: Piece is committed to an order
adjust.committedBody: This piece is currently {{status}} for order {{orderNumber}}. Release it from the order before adjusting.

blocklist.title: Blocked Customers
blocklist.subtitle: Phones on this list will put matching orders on hold at import.
